SectorAnalysis.description: Structured extraction for a single sector from the day's news.

entities.description: Named companies, organizations, or notable figures mentioned.
entities.title: Entities

sector.description: Sector name from the fixed taxonomy.
sector.title: Sector

sentiment.description: Overall market sentiment for this sector.
sentiment.title: Sentiment

news_category.description: Primary type of news event driving this sector.
news_category.title: News Category

extraction_status.description: 'ok' if full extraction succeeded; 'partial' if evidence was thin.
extraction_status.title: Extraction Status

SectorAnalysis.title: SectorAnalysis

schema.description: Analysis of all relevant sectors found in a single day's news feed.

sectors.description: List of ALL relevant sectors (1–8 max). Only include sectors with clear evidence in the news.
sectors.title: Sectors

schema.title: MultiSectorAnalysis

messages.content:
You are Ava, a sharp trader assistant. Analyze the FULL news feed and extract ALL relevant sectors.

RULES:
- Output ONLY valid JSON matching the schema provided.
- If no sector can be identified, return: {"sectors": []}
- Each sector must use a name from the enum exactly as written.
- Fill ALL required fields for each sector.
- No duplicate sectors. Maximum 8 sectors.
- No extra text outside JSON.

2026-04-23: Microsoft plans first-ever voluntary employee buyout for up to 7% of U.S. workforce: Microsoft's inaugural voluntary buyouts will be open to workers at the senior director level and below whose years of employment and age add up to 70 or more.. 2026-04-23: Meta will cut 10% of workforce as company pushes deeper into AI: Meta plans to lay off 10% of its workforce, equaling about 8,000 employees, as the company continues to ramp up investments in artificial intelligence.. 2026-04-23: Brent oil tops $105 as tensions simmer in Strait of Hormuz, Israel threatens attacks: Oil prices are rising again as tensions escalate in the U.S.-Iran conflict. . 2026-04-23: Stocks close lower, retreating from records as software shares slump, oil jumps: Live updates: Stocks pulled back on Thursday, led by a drop in software and higher oil prices.. 2026-04-23: Owning the stage: Look past Live Nation's legal troubles to see a growing, high-margin venue business: Live Nation's stock hasn't caught up to the possibility that the company, once freed from its legal overhang, can capture more fan dollars. . 2026-04-23: Regeneron inks drug pricing deal with Trump, will offer new hearing-loss therapy for free: Regeneron is the latest in a string of major drugmakers to make pricing concessions for new and existing medicines under agreements with Trump. . 2026-04-23: Texas Instruments' stock jumps 18%, heads for best day since 2000 as AI demand soars: Texas Instruments beat on earnings and revenue and gave upbeat guidance. . 2026-04-23: Spirit Airlines lawyer says cash 'not going to last for very much longer,' but government rescue on the table: Spirit Airlines confirmed it is in talks with the Trump administration for a rescue package.. 2026-04-23: OpenAI announces war is hitting U.S. homebuilders: A slew of building suppliers reported price hikes in April on everything from foam insulation and roofing to windows and doors. . 2026-04-23: These charts show how Iran's economy is in freefall: Tehran's hardline rhetoric belies a brutal reality facing the regime and Iranian citizens: its economy, vulnerable even before the war, is now in tatters.. 2026-04-23: Software stocks plunge on ServiceNow, IBM results as AI fears escalate: Shares of ServiceNow sank over 16%, dragging down other software names like Salesforce, Workday and Oracle with it.. 2026-04-23: tanker traffic since the war began.. 2026-04-23: DOJ watchdog investigating handling of Jeffrey Epstein files: Congress passed the Jeffrey Epstein files law in November after then-Attorney General Pam security threat in history,\" Fatih Birol, the head of the International Energy Agency, told CNBC on Thursday. But this market speculation may keep the stock afloat for a while: The chatter is about a potential merger with SpaceX, Elon Musk's breakout rocket company that is set to go public later this year at a valuation approaching $2 trillion.. 2026-04-23: New grads are finding jobs faster despite a competitive job market, says report: New grads are finding jobs faster despite a competitive job market, especially in these fields, according to a report from ZipRecruiter. . 2026-04-23: Overlooked industrial Dover gets the market's attention with a strong first quarter: We're raising our price target on the industrial conglomerate, which makes everything from gas pumps to data center components. . 2026-04-23: Starbucks' loyalty program changes are drawing value-conscious customers: Starbucks made some major changes to its long-standing loyalty program last month.. 2026-04-23: Capital One miles guide: How to earn and redeem your miles: Capital One miles offer a valuable mix of simplicity and flexibility.. 2026-04-23: NIL payments have changed the significance of the NFL Draft for top prospects: The first round of the NFL Draft is still a life-changing day for all selected athletes, but NIL has changed the age and dynamics of needing a first paycheck.. 2026-04-23: Trump's net approval rating on economy and overall falls to lowest of his two terms, CNBC survey shows: President Donald Trump's overall — and economic — approval ratings plunged in the latest CNBC All-America Economic Survey.. 2026-04-23: Trump administration moves to reclassify cannabis in major shift that could expand research: Trump administration to reclassify marijuana as Schedule III, easing research barriers but not legalizing the drug or changing current federal penalties.. 2026-04-23: Warner Bros.
